title: dichondra recurvata
intro: Dichondra recurvata, also known as Dichondra or Silver Leaf, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dichondra recurvata include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Dichondra recurvata is often made into a salve or cream to be applied topically to affected areas.
